title: Coding Quality Loop Lesson
description: One row of .quality-loop/memory/lessons.jsonl. kind=outcome rows are shipped-status feedback (memory-commit --outcome) surfaced by brief, not recallable advice. source is best-effort write-time provenance; rows without it predate v6 and render as [unattributed] on recall.

outcome.description: Present only on kind=outcome rows: how the shipped change fared.

source.description: Write-time provenance (poisoning defense). Best-effort: absent fields are omitted; pre-v6 rows lack the object entirely and stay valid.
